problem id: 10dfe5c5
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) AND SHL(4)

examples:
  00001110 -> 00100000
  01110011 -> 00000000
  11010101 -> 01010000
  01001100 -> 00000000
  00101110 -> 10100000
  11100100 -> 00000000
  01111011 -> 10100000
  00110000 -> 00000000
  01000100 -> 00000000
  01011110 -> 01100000

query: 00101011
predicted answer: 10100000
